identity.name: Backdoored PyPI Package With Import-Time Subprocess (T1195.002)
identity.summary: An agent's tooling pulls 'mcp-server-helpers' — a typosquat of canonical 'mcp-server-helper' — whose __init__.py runs a post-install/import-time side effect: it spawns subprocess.run on a python one-liner that reads ~/.aws/credentials and POSTs them to C2 (gated on CORTEXSIM_C2_URL). Cortex Cloud SCA flags the typosquat name and post-install hook, NGFW catches the fetch from a non-canonical PyP…
identity.description: Language-package supply-chain compromise is the most prolific agentic attack vector: an agent that auto-installs a Python helper inherits arbitrary code execution at import time. The mcp-server-helpers package in cortex-malicious-agentic-pack is a typosquat of canonical 'mcp-server-helper'; its package __init__.py calls _post_install_beacon() at module load, which invokes subprocess.run on a python one-liner reading ~/.aws/credentials and exfiltrating via urllib to C2. The side effect is gated on CORTEXSIM_C2_URL so static scanners still flag the *shape* of import-time subprocess + credential read without any real traffic. Detection is layered: (1) Cortex Cloud SCA / SAST flags the import-time subprocess.run and the typosquatted name + unverified publisher; (2) the agentic_egress EAL plugin drives the package fetch over HTTPS with a pip/python-requests User-Agent against a non-canonical PyPI mirror, which NGFW and URL filtering flag as typosquat-of-pypi.org; (3) Cortex XDR's endpoint telemetry catches the python interpreter spawning an unexpected child subprocess immediately after a pip install. A correlation rule fuses the SCA finding and the runtime child-spawn into one agentic-supply-chain incident.

techniques.name: Supply Chain Compromise: Compromise Software Supply Chain

execution.framework_reference_id: T1195.002 — Backdoored PyPI package with import-time subprocess (CortexSim cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo)

prerequisites.description: Cortex XDR agent installed and reporting healthy on the agentic/build endpoint.
prerequisites.check_command: systemctl is-active cortex-agent || ps aux | grep -i traps

prerequisites.description: cortex-malicious-agentic-pack content present and cortexsim-eal-cli available (scenario SIM-KOI-003 requirements).

payload.code:
# step-1: static scan of the backdoored package source (safe — read only).
ls -la sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo/
cat sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo/pyproject.toml | head -20
grep -n 'subprocess\|exec\|eval\|requests\|urllib' \
  sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo/src/*.py || true
# step-2: fetch the package over HTTPS via the agentic_egress EAL plugin (canary mirror only).
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/koi-003.yml --live

expected_artifacts.description: python interpreter spawns a child subprocess at import time (post-install beacon shape).
Outbound HTTPS to a non-canonical PyPI mirror with a pip/python-requests User-Agent.

iocs.context: Non-canonical PyPI mirror serving the typosquat package in the lab.

biocs.name: KOI-003 PyPI Package Import Time Subprocess Spawn Post Install Hook
biocs.description: Code scan — package __init__.py contains subprocess.run on import (post-install hook pattern). A python interpreter spawns a child process immediately on package import — the import-time subprocess shape a SAST/EDR control must flag.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter causality_actor_process_image_name in ("python", "python3", "pip", "pip3")
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("python", "python3")
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any (".aws/credentials", "urllib.request", "urlopen", "-c")

biocs.name: KOI-003 Cortex Cloud SCA SBOM Digest Matches Known Bad Fingerprint
biocs.description: Cortex Cloud SCA — SBOM correlates package digest with known-bad fingerprint. The SCA/SBOM scan surfaces the typosquat package by name in the build toolchain command line, matching a known-bad fingerprint.
biocs.logic:
preset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS
| filter event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("pip", "pip3", "python", "python3", "twistcli", "cortexcloud", "syft")
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains "mcp-server-helpers"

xql_queries.name: KOI-003 Backdoored PyPI Package Name Typosquats Canonical Helper
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains "mcp-server-helpers"
| fields _time, agent_hostname, actor_effective_username, actor_process_image_name, action_process_image_command_line

xql_queries.name: KOI-003 Outbound HTTPS To Non Canonical PyPI Mirror With Pip User Agent
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK
| filter dst_action_external_hostname contains "cortexsim-canary" or dns_query_name contains "cortexsim-canary"
| filter action_external_port = 443
| filter http_req_user_agent contains_any ("pip", "python-requests", "python-urllib") or actor_process_image_name in ("pip", "pip3", "python", "python3")
| fields _time, agent_hostname, actor_process_image_name, dst_action_external_hostname, http_req_user_agent

xql_queries.name: KOI-003 PyPI Mirror Domain Matches Typosquat Of PyPI Org
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK
| filter dst_action_external_hostname contains "cortexsim-canary"
| filter action_external_url contains "/simple" or action_app_id_transitions contains "pypi"
| fields _time, agent_hostname, actor_process_image_name, dst_action_external_hostname, action_external_url

xql_queries.name: KOI-003 Cortex Cloud SCA Package Fails Publisher And Post Install Policy
xql_queries.query:
preset = xdr_data
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter event_type = ENUM.PROCESS and event_sub_type = ENUM.PROCESS_START
| filter actor_process_image_name in ("pip", "pip3", "twistcli", "cortexcloud", "syft", "grep")
| filter action_process_image_command_line contains_any ("mcp-server-helpers", "subprocess", "__init__")
| fields _time, agent_hostname, actor_process_image_name, action_process_image_command_line

correlation_rules.name: Agentic Supply Chain — Backdoored PyPI Package Post-Install Hook
correlation_rules.logic: BIOC(KOI-003 PyPI Package Import Time Subprocess Spawn Post Install Hook) OR BIOC(KOI-003 Cortex Cloud SCA SBOM Digest Matches Known Bad Fingerprint)

analytics_modules: Cortex Cloud SCA — typosquat + post-install hook + SBOM fingerprint scanner
Cortex XDR Analytics — python interpreter spawning child subprocess at package import

products.evidence_query: Cortex Cloud SCA finding: typosquat name + import-time subprocess + unverified publisher for sources/cortex-malicious-agentic-pack/pypi/mcp-server-helpers-typo

preset = xdr_data | filter causality_actor_process_image_name in ("python","python3","pip") and actor_process_image_name in ("python","python3") | fields _time, agent_hostname, action_process_image_command_line
Correlation CR-KOI-0003 fuses the SCA finding with the runtime import-time child-spawn into one agentic-supply-chain incident.

use_cases.name: Language-Package Supply-Chain Compromise
use_cases.description: Detect a typosquatted PyPI package with an import-time post-install hook across static (Cortex Cloud SCA) and runtime (XDR/NGFW) telemetry, and stitch into one incident.

test_cases.objective: Cortex Cloud SCA flags the typosquat name + post-install hook.
preconditions: Cortex Cloud SCA configured on the agentic-tooling build.
success_criteria: Finding `CCS-SCA-TYPOSQUAT-001` fires on the name near-miss.
XQL `KOI-003 Backdoored PyPI Package Name Typosquats Canonical Helper` returns >= 1 row.

test_cases.objective: Runtime import-time child-spawn + fetch stitch into one incident.
success_criteria: BIOC `KOI-003 PyPI Package Import Time Subprocess Spawn Post Install Hook` fires.
Correlation `CR-KOI-0003` groups SCA + runtime into one incident.

preventive_controls: Install only from a signed, mirrored internal PyPI index; block typosquat names within edit-distance 2 of approved packages.
Run Cortex Cloud SCA as a build gate that fails on import-time subprocess / network / credential-read patterns.
Run pip installs with --no-build-isolation in sandboxed, network-restricted build agents.
Deny build/agent identities read access to credential files (~/.aws, ~/.ssh).
detection_engineering: Alert when a python interpreter spawns a child subprocess immediately after a pip install (import-time hook).
Match typosquat package names and unverified publishers in SCA/SBOM output.
Correlate the SCA finding with the runtime import-time child-spawn from the same host into one incident.

references.title: Unit 42 — PyPI Typosquatting in AI Agent Tooling
MITRE ATT&CK T1195.002 — Compromise Software Supply Chain
